name: Miniclaw Backup
description: Daily tgz backups of the openclaw state directory with tiered retention: recent dailies, monthly milestones, yearly archives.

backupDir.description: Directory to store backup archives (must be OUTSIDE the state dir to avoid recursive backup). Defaults to ~/.openclaw-backups/

recentQuotaBytes.description: Keep all daily backups while total size is under this threshold (bytes). Default: 1073741824 (1 GB)

totalQuotaBytes.description: Hard cap on total backup size. Beyond recentQuota, only 1st-of-month kept. Beyond totalQuota, only Jan 1st kept. Default: 2147483648 (2 GB)

excludeDirs.description: Directories (relative to state dir) to exclude from backup. Default: ['projects', '.git', 'node_modules', 'backups', 'logs', 'tmp', 'browser', 'media']. Note: media under user/<bot>/media/ is excluded by the top-level 'media' entry — set includeUserMedia to keep it.

includeUserMedia.description: Include user/<bot>/media/ in backups (generated images, screenshots, etc). Default: false — keeps backups small. Set true if media isn't reproducible.
